summary: Iteration 256 — Client Snapshot + Client Status System testing complete. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: Clients page shows Stato column, Mostra archiviati checkbox, and archive/reactivate buttons. Invoice editor correctly filters to show only active clients.
seed_data_creation: Test clients and invoices created and cleaned up automatically via API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Client Snapshot + Status system fully implemented and tested. Key features: 1) GET /api/clients/ defaults to active-only, use include_archived=true for all. 2) POST /api/clients/{id}/archive|block|reactivate endpoints work. 3) client_snapshot stored on invoices at creation time. 4) Migration endpoints at /api/admin/migration/ for backfilling. 5) Frontend ClientsPage.js has Stato column, Mostra archiviati checkbox, archive/reactivate buttons. 6) InvoiceEditorPage.js fetches only active clients for selector.

clients_page.stato_column_visible: PASS - Stato column present in table header
clients_page.new_client_dialog: PASS - Dialog opens with all tabs (Anagrafica, Indirizzo, Contatti, Pagamento, Note, Email Inviate)

client_status_model.description: ClientStatus enum (active/archived/blocked), status field in ClientBase/ClientResponse/ClientUpdate

client_routes.description: archive/block/reactivate endpoints at lines 272-323, status filter in GET at lines 48-52
